title: Stripe Integration with WorkForms
excerpt: I am excited about the possibilities with WorkForms for our company. Something that could take them to the next level is if we could integrate Stripe (or a similar service) with them so that we can take payment for order…

posts.author: nsheetz86 (Nick Sheetz)
posts.cookedHtml: I am excited about the possibilities with WorkForms for our company. Something that could take them to the next level is if we could integrate Stripe (or a similar service) with them so that we can take payment for orders within our Monday.com WorkOS.

posts.author: Nir-Jetpack (Nir @ Jetpack Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Stripe Integration with monday.com WorkForms is now easier than ever with GetSign.

Once a form is submitted, with a simple integration a payment request email is sent to the receiver, After Stripe check out, all data is saved on your board.

Learn more below

GetSign

Collect payment with Stripe - GetSign

Enables recipients to make payments as they sign.
